participants_or_roles: DfT pre-application contact; Legal Review Agent
summary: Ask DfT to confirm current expected route and dossier format for an initial England WPL order without treating the response as confirmation.

participants_or_roles: DfT pre-application contact; Appraisal Review Agent
summary: Ask whether DfT expects five-case OBC/FBC alignment, specific TAG material, value-for-money evidence or additional confirmation evidence.

participants_or_roles: DfT pre-application contact; Legal Review Agent; Consultation Review Agent
summary: Ask for current expectations on order contents, consultation evidence, inquiry possibility, modifications and reconsultation.

participants_or_roles: DfT pre-application contact; Finance Review Agent
summary: Ask for expectations on Schedule 12 ten-year plan, five-year programme, net-proceeds accounting and annual statements.

participants_or_roles: DfT pre-application contact; WECA Governance Agent
summary: Ask whether DfT expects any WECA/MCA assurance, funding, consultation or role evidence for a Bristol WPL.
